subject: GRB 061213: MASTER-VWF-Kislovodsk optical candidate
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <gcncirc@observ.inetcomm.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, A.Belinski, N.Shatskiy, E.Gorbovskoy,D.Kuvshinov,
N.Tyurina, P.Gritsyk
Sternberg Astronomical Institute, Moscow Union 'Optic'

A.Tlatov, I.Golubov
Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo observatory

"MASTER Very Wide Filed Camera located at Kislovodsk Solar Station 
(http://observ.pereplet.ru, D=70 mm, 400 square degrees) has moved to the 
Swift-BAT trigger 250033 and it has taken a series of 5s exposures starting 
303s after the Notice Time at 17:01:33.658 UT (the large delay was due to 
problems with connection). The weather is not very good.
New object has been found within the Swift-BAT error box.

19 15 05    +10 57 22
+-30"

m=12

The message may be cited.

mailto: lipunov@sai.msu.ru
